name: Kathleen Madigan
blurb: A former print journalist, she built her career on the comedy-club circuit and won Funniest Female Stand-Up Comic at the 1996 American Comedy Awards.
bio: Kathleen Madigan is an American stand-up comedian known for a relaxed, conversational storytelling style drawn from her large Irish Catholic family and everyday observations. A former print journalist, she built her career on the comedy-club circuit and won Funniest Female Stand-Up Comic at the 1996 American Comedy Awards. She has released numerous specials and tours steadily.

timeline.ev: Wins Funniest Female Stand-Up Comic at the American Comedy Awards
Reaches the finals of NBCs Last Comic Standing
Releases the Netflix special Bothering Jesus
Releases the Amazon special Hunting Bigfoot

accolades: Funniest Female Stand-Up Comic, 1996 American Comedy Awards
Finalist on NBCs Last Comic Standing
Bothering Jesus among the best-selling comedy albums on streaming

specials.t: It's a sign of the End of the World
